fields.description: When enabled, delivery confirmation will automatically create a billing record
fields.label: Auto-create billing on delivery confirmation

fields.description: Google Chat space ID for delivery 1-stop-away alerts (e.g. spaces/AAQABiNmpBg). Leave blank to use default.
fields.label: Delivery Notification Space

fields.description: Customer service phone number shown in store-facing communications
fields.label: Customer Service Phone

fields.description: Minimum remaining shelf life (in days) for batches to pass the dispatch/receiving gate. Set 0 to disable.
fields.label: Minimum Shelf Life (Days)

fields.description: PO grand total above this amount requires dual approval (CPO + CFO)
fields.label: Dual Approval Threshold

fields.description: Annual purchases above this amount require supplier TIN on file
fields.label: TIN Requirement Threshold

fields.description: Days since supplier creation to consider them a 'new supplier' for CEO approval
fields.label: New Supplier Window (Days)

fields.description: Block PO if item price exceeds this percentage variance from historical average
fields.label: Price Variance Block %

fields.description: Number of days to look back for price variance calculation
fields.label: Price Variance Lookback (Days)

fields.description: Default VAT rate for VAT-registered suppliers (%). Non-VAT and exempt suppliers use 0%.
fields.label: Default VAT Rate

fields.description: Default EWT rate (%) used when supplier has no specific rate. 1% for goods (WI100), 2% for services (WC100).
fields.label: Default EWT Rate

fields.description: FG items with stock below this are flagged as low stock
fields.label: FG Low Stock Threshold

fields.description: Default safety stock for non-FG items when item-level safety_stock is not set
fields.label: Non-FG Low Stock Fallback

fields.description: Days to subtract from shelf life for dispatch buffer (shelf_life - buffer = minimum remaining days)
fields.label: Shelf Life Dispatch Buffer (Days)

fields.description: GR/IR Clearing account for goods receipt accrual
fields.label: GR/IR Clearing Account

fields.description: Input VAT account for goods purchases
fields.label: Input VAT - Goods

fields.description: Input VAT account for services purchases
fields.label: Input VAT - Services

fields.description: Input VAT account for capital goods purchases
fields.label: Input VAT - Capital Goods

fields.description: Advances to Suppliers account for advance payment tracking
fields.label: Advances to Suppliers Account

fields.description: EWT Payable account for withholding tax entries
fields.label: EWT Payable Account

fields.description: Accounts Payable - Trade account
fields.label: AP Trade Account

fields.description: Default cost center for procurement GL entries
fields.label: Default Cost Center

fields.description: CPO (Chief Procurement Officer) who approves POs as first-level approver
fields.label: CPO Approver

fields.description: CFO who approves POs above dual approval threshold
fields.label: CFO Approver

fields.description: CEO who approves POs from new suppliers
fields.label: CEO Approver

fields.description: Maximum over-receipt tolerance as a percentage of ordered quantity. Set 0 to enforce exact match.
fields.label: GR Over-Receipt Tolerance %

fields.description: Default warehouse for Goods Receipts when the PO has no ship_to address. Used as fallback in create_goods_receipt().
fields.label: Default Receiving Warehouse

fields.description: Comma-separated warehouse name patterns that identify 3PL partner warehouses (e.g. 3MD,Pinnacle,Royal Cold,RCS)
fields.label: 3PL Warehouse Patterns

fields.description: The commissary company for inter-company transfers
fields.label: Commissary Company

fields.description: Comma-separated list of companies whose warehouses can receive commissary dispatches
fields.label: Allowed Target Companies
Price Validity (Days)
fields.description: Default validity period for new Item Prices (days from entry date)

fields.label: Default Buying Price List
fields.description: Set to 'Standard Buying' after running the S104 migration

fields.label: BKI Markup % — JV Stores
fields.description: Markup % applied to BKI→JV store sales (ICT-002). Default 2.75% keeps BKI net taxable income ≤ PHP 5M for 20% CIT eligibility.

fields.label: BKI Markup % — Managed Franchise
fields.description: Markup % applied to BKI→Managed Franchise store sales (ICT-002, BIL-005).

fields.label: BKI Markup % — Full Franchise
fields.description: Markup % applied to BKI→Full Franchise store sales (ICT-002, BIL-005).

fields.label: BKI Markup % — Company Owned
fields.description: S231 D-1: BKI intercompany markup applied to deliveries to Company-owned stores. Per CEO 2026-05-02: same rate as JV (2.75%) keeps BKI net taxable income ≤ PHP 5M for 20% CIT eligibility.

fields.label: BKI Monthly Billing Cron Enabled
fields.description: S231 Pre-Phase-0: kill-switch for `scheduled_monthly_billing` cron. Default 0 = cron is no-op. Finance flips to 1 only after ratifying dry-run output.

fields.label: BKI Sales VAT Template
fields.description: Tax template applied to BKI→store Sales Invoices. Must be a 12% Output VAT template (ICT-001).

fields.label: BKI Sales Income Account
fields.description: GL account used for the credit line on BKI→store Sales Invoices. ICT-008 Option C: 4000101 SALES - BKI TO STORES (under 4000100 WHOLESALE / B2B SALES).

fields.label: BKI Default Incoterm
fields.description: ICT-007: Destination terms. Revenue recognized when the store signs and accepts the Delivery Receipt; loss in transit is BKI's.

fields.label: BKI Output VAT Account
fields.description: Phase 1 / R1 Amendment 9 / ICT-009: Configurable Output VAT GL account for BKI→store SIs. Default 2102205 OUTPUT VAT PAYABLE - BKI.

fields.label: BKI Sales Debit-To Account
fields.description: S231 D-1: Receivable account used as debit_to on BKI→store SIs. Required so BKI Sales Invoices post to a single, configurable AR account instead of relying on Customer-default fallback (which can drift if a per-store Customer is rebuilt).

fields.label: BKI Sales Invoice Naming Series
fields.description: S231 D-1: Naming series prefix for BKI→store SIs (e.g. "BKI-SI-.YYYY.-.####"). Lets Finance keep BKI invoice numbering distinct from BEI/BFC series.

fields.label: Enable EWT on BKI→Store Sales
fields.description: Phase 13 / ICT-004: When checked, BKI→store Sales Invoices include an EWT line using BEI Settings.default_ewt_rate and ewt_payable_account. Default OFF (BEI is not Top 20,000 taxpayer).

fields.label: Enable BKI→Store PI Generator
fields.description: S238/S247: kill switch for the store-side Purchase Invoice auto-generator that fires on BKI SI submit. Set to 0 to temporarily disable (used by S247 Phase 6 cleanup to prevent cascade-recursion during historical SI delete sweep).

fields.label: Enable BKI→Store Stock Entry Generator
fields.description: S247: kill switch for the store-side Stock Entry (Material Receipt) auto-generator that fires on BKI SI submit. Posts inventory landing on the store's books with SRBNB as GR/IR clearing account. Set to 0 to temporarily disable (used by S247 Phase 6 cleanup).

fields.label: BFC + JV Franchise Fee Billing (S231)
fields.description: S231 D-3 + D-4: monthly franchise fee billing to BFC (Royalty + Marketing + Management + E-com for MF/FF stores) and BEI (Marketing + E-com for JV stores). Cron is gated by bki_billing_cron_enabled (default 0); flip to 1 only after Finance ratifies dry-run.

fields.label: BFC Revenue Company
fields.description: S231 D-4: SI.company target for franchise fees collected on behalf of BFC (Managed Franchise + Full Franchise stores: Royalty, Marketing, Management, E-com). Per CEO 2026-05-02 the canonical name is BEBANG FRANCHISE CORP. (uppercase, matches abbr=BFC). BEI acts as collection agent during interim per Collection Agent Letter.

fields.label: BFC Sales VAT Template
fields.description: S231 D-3: Tax template applied to franchise fee SIs issued under BFC. Must be a 12% Output VAT template registered to BFC.

fields.label: BFC Sales Invoice Naming Series
fields.description: S231 D-3: Naming series for BFC franchise fee SIs (e.g. "BFC-SI-.YYYY.-.####"). Required by _assert_bfc_billing_ready precondition before any monthly billing run.

fields.label: BFC OR Booklet Active
fields.description: S231 D-3: kill-switch. When 0, _assert_bfc_billing_ready throws and no BFC franchise fee SIs can be created. Finance flips to 1 when the BFC OR booklet is procured from BIR.

fields.label: BFC VAT Registration Active
fields.description: S231 D-3: kill-switch. When 0, _assert_bfc_billing_ready throws. Finance flips to 1 when BFC VAT registration is confirmed by BIR.

fields.label: JV Revenue Company
fields.description: S231 D-4: SI.company target for JV franchise fees (Marketing 5% gross + E-com 5% website only). Per CEO 2026-05-02 these go to BEI PERMANENTLY (NOT BFC), per Collection Agent Letter §"What this letter does NOT cover" item 4.

fields.label: JV Sales VAT Template
fields.description: S231 D-3: Tax template applied to JV franchise fee SIs issued under BEI. Must be a 12% Output VAT template registered to BEI.
